source_report: Global feasibility of YourGov-style civic-transparency apps
scope: 193 UN member states plus the Holy See and the State of Palestine
caveat: /global is a feasibility globe. It does not claim YourGov currently supports every country.

status_rules.orange: Buildable with effort: possible but requires source and integration work
status_rules.red: Not currently viable from the verified extract, or insufficient verified data

countries.name: Afghanistan
countries.summary: Not in the verified Ready/Pilot or Buildable bands in the uploaded research extract. Treat as unavailable for a YourGov adapter until sources are verified.
